content: Task: Planning team analyzes PRD + requirements for Exact Online module. Engineering team produces implementation plan. CRITICAL: Auth is API key, NOT OAuth2. Project: /Users/mihail/projects/SUPWISE/
Parallel delegation: Planning Lead (spec from PRD) + Engineering Lead (implementation plan). Both corrected: API key auth only.

Produced plan.md (10 sections, architecture) and spec.md (9 features, 54 ACs). Architect wrote plan, Spec Writer wrote spec. Key: API key auth, article dedup, 3-layer error handling, 14 workday timeline.

Produced implementation-plan.md (full blueprint, 6 services, migration SQL, Prisma schema) and implementation-review.md (APPROVED, 2 minor items). Backend Dev read entire codebase. Code Reviewer validated. 12 workday estimate.

Both teams aligned on: API key auth, 3-controller module, circuit breaker at 7 errors, no BullMQ, article dedup on exact_item_code, DB triggers for outdated detection. Planning: 54 ACs for 9 features. Engineering: 12-workday blueprint with code review APPROVED.
